html:
Exclusive to:

Stuffed Fish Heads is a Crock Pot recipe exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in Return of Them. It is made of 1 Barnacles and at least 1 other Fishes with a total value of at least 1.0, filler can be anything.

Unlike most other Crock Pot dishes, this one does not increase sanity, however, it restores more health and hunger than most of it's ingredients, it also spoils fast, and so should be eaten straight away.

Adding any Vegetables may result in Barnacle Pita. A Meat value of more than 2.5 produces Surf 'n' Turf.

Recipe

≥1.0

Examples

×2

Trivia

  • Stuffed Fish Heads were introduced in the Troubled Waters update.
By TypeBy Crock Pot Value

Unlike most other Crock Pot dishes, this one does not increase sanity, however, it restores more health and hunger than most of it's ingredients, it also spoils fast, and so should be eaten straight away.
Adding any Vegetables may result in Barnacle Pita. A Meat value of more than 2.5 produces Surf 'n' Turf.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Đầu Cá Nhồi là một công thức Nồi Hầm dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó được tạo thành từ 1 con hà và ít nhất 1 con cá khác có tổng giá trị ít nhất là 1,0, phụ có thể là bất cứ thứ gì.

'''Stuffed Fish Heads''' is a [[Crock Pot]] recipe exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'' introduced in ''[[Return of Them]]''. It is made of 1 [[Barnacles]] and at least 1 other [[Fishes]] with a total value of at least 1.0, filler can be anything. 

Unlike most other Crock Pot dishes, this one does not increase sanity, however, it restores more health and hunger than most of it's ingredients, it also spoils fast, and so should be eaten straight away. 

Adding any [[Vegetables]] may result in [[Barnacle Pita]]. A Meat value of more than 2.5 produces [[Surf 'n' Turf]].

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Fishes
|comparator2 = ≥
|count2 = 1.0
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Fish Heads
}}

== {{pic|32|Crock Pot}} Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Freshwater Fish
|count2 = 2
|item3 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Fish Heads
}}
{{Recipe
|item1 = Barnacle
|item2 = Raw Fish
|item3 = Ice
|item4 = Ice
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Stuffed Fish Heads
}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}}Trivia ==
* Stuffed Fish Heads were introduced in the ''[[Return of Them#Troubled Waters|Troubled Waters]]'' update.
